def process_request(request):
    if not request.headers.get("Authorization"):
        return {"error": "unauthorized"}, 401
    token = request.headers["Authorization"].split(" ")[1]
    user = decode_token(token)
    if not user:
        return {"error": "invalid token"}, 401
    if request.method == "POST":
        data = request.get_json()
        if not data.get("name"):
            return {"error": "name required"}, 400
        if not data.get("email"):
            return {"error": "email required"}, 400
        if len(data.get("password", "")) < 8:
            return {"error": "password too short"}, 400
        existing = db.query(User).filter_by(email=data["email"]).first()
        if existing:
            return {"error": "email taken"}, 409
        password_hash = hash_password(data["password"])
        user = User(name=data["name"], email=data["email"], password_hash=password_hash)
        db.add(user)
        db.commit()
        send_email(data["email"], "Welcome!", f"Hello {data['name']}")
        log_action(user.id, "register")
        return {"status": "created", "user_id": user.id}, 201
    elif request.method == "GET":
        page = int(request.args.get("page", 1))
        per_page = int(request.args.get("per_page", 20))
        users = db.query(User).offset((page - 1) * per_page).limit(per_page).all()
        total = db.query(User).count()
        return {"users": [u.to_dict() for u in users], "total": total, "page": page}
    return {"error": "method not allowed"}, 405
